steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The colon after the blank introduces the proof: the population grew "from as few as 100 birds...to around 1,300 in 2023." The word must describe an approach that achieved its goal of boosting bird numbers.

steps.title: Eliminate each choice
steps.content:
A. Successful means achieving the intended result. Substituting: "this approach was apparently successful" — confirmed by the 13-fold population increase the colon provides as evidence. A is correct.

B. Disastrous means causing great harm. The population grew dramatically — there was no harm. Direct contradiction. Eliminated.

C. Amusing means entertaining or funny. Planting 500,000 trees to save a species is a conservation effort, not a source of amusement. Unsupported. Eliminated.

D. Costly means expensive. The passage provides no information about the financial cost of the tree-planting program. Unsupported. Eliminated.
